title: Product Analyst / Data Analyst
required_skills: Minimum 2 years in Product Analytics, Data Analytics, CRM Analytics, or similar B2C-focused analytical roles
Strong SQL skills with experience analysing large and complex datasets
Experience using BI and data visualisation tools (Tableau, Power BI, Looker, or similar)
Understanding of product and business metrics (conversion, retention, churn, LTV, deposits)
Hands-on experience with funnel analysis, segmentation, cohort analysis, A/B testing
Strong analytical mindset with ability to translate data into actionable recommendations
Proficiency in Ukrainian or Russian for internal communication (required)
bonus_skills: Experience in iGaming, fintech, CRM analytics, VIP segmentation
matched_skills: Power BI: PL-300 certified — matches BI and data visualisation tools requirement
Data storytelling and reporting: executive dashboards, KPI reporting across multiple roles
FinTech experience: HSBC background provides some sector adjacency
Analytical mindset: structured data analysis and insights delivery
missing_skills: Proficiency in Ukrainian or Russian — HARD DISQUALIFIER (required for internal communication)
Strong SQL skills (no SQL experience in CV)
Funnel analysis, cohort analysis, A/B testing methodologies
B2C product analytics experience (candidate background is B2B PMO)
iGaming, betting, or CRM analytics domain experience
2+ years in a formal analytics role
core_responsibilities: Analyse user behaviour across key product funnels (registration, deposits, engagement, retention, betting)
Monitor and evaluate core product KPIs (conversion, churn, LTV, engagement)
Prepare detailed analytical reports and dashboards
Conduct A/B testing analysis and evaluate product experiments
Perform user segmentation and cohort analysis
Collaborate with Product, CRM, Marketing, Anti-Fraud teams
recommended_emphasis: This role is a poor match — application is not recommended
Ukrainian or Russian proficiency is required — the candidate does not have this language skill
SQL is a core technical requirement that the candidate lacks
The iGaming/betting context is a very specific domain outside the candidate's background
summary: Match score 19.0% — poor match. The role has a hard language requirement (Ukrainian or Russian) that the candidate cannot meet, making application impossible regardless of other qualifications. Additionally, the role requires SQL proficiency, B2C product analytics experience, and iGaming domain expertise — all of which represent significant gaps. Application is not recommended.
